title: TpmRc inner field made private with public raw() accessor — correct API boundary
description: TpmRc(pub u32) → TpmRc(u32) with pub raw() and pub(crate) from_raw. This is the right call: external callers get read access via raw() but cannot construct arbitrary TpmRc values from raw u32s. A future contributor might suggest making from_raw public 'for convenience' — resist this: callers should receive TpmRc via Error::check or pattern matching, not construct them from scratch.
